message:
refactor(main): migrate asupersync imports to runtime_compat abstractions

Systematic migration from direct asupersync type usage to the frankenterm_core
runtime_compat abstraction layer, improving portability across async runtimes:

Import replacements (13+ occurrences):
- asupersync::sync::Mutex<T> → frankenterm_core::runtime_compat::Mutex<T>
- asupersync::sync::Semaphore → runtime_compat::Semaphore
- asupersync::process::Command → runtime_compat::process::Command
- asupersync::task::JoinHandle → runtime_compat::task::JoinHandle

Test macro migration (11 occurrences):
- #[asupersync::test] → #[tokio::test]

New CLI command:
- EvaluateAnomaly: robot command for semantic anomaly Z-score evaluation
  on pane output, bridging the new semantic_anomaly module to the CLI

Cargo.toml:
- Added tokio to dev-dependencies with macros + rt-multi-thread features

mcp_proxy_integration.rs:
- Minor formatting cleanup in test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 
+
 anyhow.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
@@ -63,3 +64,4 @@ redis-session = ["frankenterm-core/redis-session"]
 assert_cmd = "2.1.2"
 predicates = "3.1.3"
 tempfile = "3.23.0"
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
